name: Herbert Hoover
description: president of the United States from 1929 to 1933 (1874–1964)
abstract: Herbert Clark Hoover (August 10, 1874 – October 20, 1964) was the 31st president of the United States, serving from 1929 to 1933. As a member of the Republican Party, he served as the third United States secretary of commerce from 1921 to 1928 before being elected president in 1928.

concerts.label: Meeting: Food for Europe's Children, featuring address by Herbert Hoover

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Hendricks
about_quotes.evidence: I remember standing in line, under President Hoover, just to be fed
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Hendricks — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
